case_title: CACH, LLC VS. JOANNE E FRANCIS-FLYNN et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF NON SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT UNABLE TO SERVE JOANNE E FRANCIS-FLYNN FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT FRANCIS-FLYNN, JOANNE E AN INDIVIDUAL DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-19-2014
DECLARATION OF NON SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-13-2014 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAY-13-2014 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
